preview.summary: New Zealand close their Group G campaign against a star-studded Belgium side built around its veteran golden-generation spine. Belgium's creativity and pace should dominate possession, while the All Whites dig in for the physical, set-piece battle that suits them.
preview.homeForm: New Zealand sit 85th in the world, the group's lowest seed, led by captain and record scorer Chris Wood.
preview.awayForm: Belgium arrive ranked 9th under Rudi Garcia, anchored by the experienced trio of De Bruyne, Courtois and Lukaku.
preview.homeKey: Chris Wood, Nottingham Forest forward and New Zealand's record scorer.
preview.awayKey: Kevin De Bruyne, the creative heartbeat orchestrating Belgium's attack.
storylines: Belgium's golden generation seeks a convincing send-off from the group
Doku's pace against New Zealand's deep block
Wood looks to trouble Courtois on the big stage
preview.h2h: The two nations have never met at senior level.
